title: Evangelion Sound Impact
wikitext:
[]: [Video Game] Evangelion: Sound Impact             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Wed Jun 15, 2011 1:56 am ANN's Todd Ciolek (segments bolded by yours truly) wrote: Sound Impact is a rhythm-action game with six different modes of play, and it's the work of Suda 51's Grasshopper Manufacture and composer Akira Yamaoka , who also collaborated on next week's Shadows of the Damned. In fact, Yamaoka's remixing 30 pieces of Evangelion music for the game, due out at the end of September.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jun 15, 2011 3:26 pm Just the fact that they're not publishing yet another pachinko game is a good news (at least for PSP they've published 3 pachinko games in a row during the last year, the last one has been published just some days ago ). Anyway thanks for reporting it, there are some crappy magazine pictures on this Japanese website, hopefully better scans (and more infos) will be available in the next days/weeks.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Wed Jun 15, 2011 3:31 pm http://www.andriasang.com/e/blog/2011/06/15/rhythm_evangelion/ Suda 51 will be the game's creative producer, 30+ tracks remixed by Yamaoka, all of them run by and approved by Sagisu. *FANGIRL SQUEE*

[]:             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Wed Jun 15, 2011 3:59 pm Evangelion rhythm game? AWESOME. Akira Yamaoka? REALLY AWESOME! Grasshopper?! HOLY ****ING SHIT!

[]:             Quote Post by NickFury90 » Wed Jun 15, 2011 4:40 pm ... I want this, even though I have no idea what the hell it is... [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Pr9ExScjBno[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 15, 2011 8:48 pm WHERE DO I PREORDER THIS SHIT. As tempting as the most expensive package is (Yes I'm freakin' weird), I guess I'd probably stick with the package that includes the soundtrack, assuming I'd have the money to burn by that point. _____ Also, my first news update within about a year (wow). I hope I didn't screw anything up. http://www.evageeks.org/2011/06/new-psp-game-eva-sound-impact/ ANN source: http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2011-06-15/grasshopper-silent-hill-yamaoka-make-eva-rhythm-game

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Wed Jun 15, 2011 10:31 pm @SSD: You should add to the news post that the game is being produced by Goichi "Suda51" Suda, director of Killer7 and No More Heroes . Also, what's the best import site? Are there any that where you can order the special edition(s) of the game?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 15, 2011 10:39 pm Whoops, thanks! As for preordering, probably Play Asia http://www.play-asia.com/ or maybe CD Japan http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/ is your best bet.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Wed Jun 15, 2011 10:49 pm Also, here is the Collector's Edition: http://www.neogaf.com/forum/showpost.php?p=28634302&postcount=102 OH MY GOD I NEED THAT

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 15, 2011 11:29 pm Holy shit, same here. Maybe I should just save up any money strictly for that... I added an image of the cover to the news post. Shit, this game looks pretty sweet even with the visuals. @_@ And also, related: http://www.famitsu.com/news/201106/16045292.html

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Thu Jun 16, 2011 12:13 am SUDA51!? WHAT? WHERE? English pleeeeeeeeeeeeeeeease. Otherwise i will just learn Japanese...

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Jun 16, 2011 12:49 am And here is a trailer . (And the website it came from .) I wonder how many Evangelion -related commercials Kotono Mitsuishi has done by now? And how much she gets paid for each one?

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Thu Jun 16, 2011 12:57 am 3nd Impact? Hooray Engrish!

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Thu Jun 16, 2011 1:03 am Fireand'chutes77 wrote: 3nd Impact? Hooray Engrish!

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Thu Jun 16, 2011 1:04 am Fireand'chutes77 wrote: 3nd Impact? Hooray Engrish!

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Thu Jun 16, 2011 9:05 am .....let me get this straight. The creators of No More Heroes are going to make an Evangelion game?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jun 16, 2011 10:55 am gatotsu911 wrote: And here is a trailer . (And the website it came from .)

[]:             Quote Post by shito » Fri Jun 17, 2011 6:35 am Suda making a rhythm game, this should be worth checking out. Also finally an Evangelion game that (I hope) doesn't require deep understanding of Japanese language to be playable (after Evangelion64 and that fighting PS2 game)

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Fri Jun 17, 2011 9:22 am Fireand'chutes77 wrote: 3nd Impact? Hooray Engrish!

[]:             Quote Post by McDirty » Sat Jun 18, 2011 12:27 am English in Japan (or even Asia in that matter), is treated quite peculiar sometimes. Even if you're talking in horrible english, you're considered 'cool'. I guess Gainax wanted to show how cool they were with their play on words, even if native english speakers didn't get it. EDIT: Oh and Akira Yamaoka is one my fav composers. So I hope this is good.
